message:
feat(obligation): convert Lease protocol to session_protocol! macro (bd-3u5d3.4)

Replace hand-written lease module with session_protocol! macro
invocation using loop/continue DSL for recursive protocol encoding.
The macro generates InitiatorLoop/ResponderLoop type aliases and
renew_loop() constructor automatically. All tests pass unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
